creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this gem for your next date in Old Dubai!

📍 @arabian.fishhouse in Al Shindagha, near Al Ghubaiba Metro Station

This restaurant is from the people who founded Arabian Tea House; hence it exudes the same nostalgic and charming atmosphere. It has a compact yet homey indoor seating with only 3 tables, and more dining space outdoor which you have to save for the cooler months. 

We definitely need to go back here on winter to dine in the terrace and try their seafood dishes. But for now, we settled with light afternoon snacks - a manakish tray and karak. 

#Dubai #mydubai #visitdubai #dubaireels #lifewithladyanne #ladyandhersweetescape #dubaidestinations #arabianfishhouse #olddubai

transcription.text: Is this the place we used to love? Is this the place that I've been dreaming of? Oh, simple thing
